positive: A stylized illustration of a majestic, coiled dragon entwined around a single, blooming bioluminescent lotus flower. The dragon should feature geometric, tribal-inspired scales and glowing azure accents, contrasted against deep sapphire blues and emerald greens. The composition must be centered and symmetric, with clean lines and strong silhouettes perfect for a print. Use a vibrant, limited palette with high contrast and an intricate, tapestry-like detail. Minimalist background with radial symmetry, vector-art quality, ink drawing, graphic novel style, high resolution, commercial print quality.
